 = Valkyria Chronicles III =

 Senjō no Valkyria 3 : Unrecorded Chronicles is a tactical role @-@ playing video game developed by Sega . Published for the PlayStation Portable , the game was released in Japan on January 27 , 2011 . A fan translation of the game was released to English @-@ speaking audiences in 2013 .

 The game is the third entry in the Valkyria series . It takes place in Europa , a fictional continent based on Europe , in the mid 20th century . Players follow the Nameless , a penal military unit .

 = = Gameplay = =

 Combat in Valkyria Chronicles III uses the BLiTZ system , a hybrid turn based real @-@ time tactics engine .
